- Whitelabel Infrastructure: Complete white-labeling for partner businesses
- Business Integrations: Go High Level (GHL) content pipeline
- Enterprise Features: OAuth, Stripe billing, commission tracking

Core Responsibilities

AI Integration & Architecture:
- Design and implement seamless integration with multiple AI APIs (OpenRouter, Fal.ai, OpenAI, Anthropic)
- Build custom tool creation system similar to GPT Actions
- Implement LoRA training workflows for Flux models
- Optimize AI API usage for cost-efficiency and performance

Full-Stack Development:
- Develop responsive React/Next.js frontend with real-time chat interfaces
- Build scalable backend APIs using Node.js/Python with proper architecture
- Design and implement multi-tenant database systems (PostgreSQL/MongoDB)
- Create real-time communication systems using WebSockets

SaaS & Business Logic:
- Architect complete whitelabel infrastructure with custom domains/branding
- Implement complex Stripe billing with multiple subscription tiers
- Build commission tracking systems for partner revenue sharing
- Develop Go High Level integration for automated content pushing

DevOps & Infrastructure:
- Deploy and manage cloud infrastructure (AWS/Azure) with auto-scaling
- Implement CI/CD pipelines for automated testing and deployment
- Set up monitoring, logging, and security systems
- Manage database optimization and backup strategies

Required Technical Skills

Frontend Mastery:
- 5+ years React/Next.js with TypeScript
- Advanced CSS frameworks (Tailwind, styled-components)
- Real-time UI development (WebSockets,  ---------- )
- Mobile-responsive design and PWA development

Backend Expertise:
- 5+ years Node.js/Express or Python/FastAPI
- RESTful API design and GraphQL experience
- Multi-tenant database architecture and design
- Microservices architecture understanding

AI/ML Integration:
- 3+ years hands-on AI API integration experience
- Deep understanding of LLM capabilities and limitations
- Experience with model fine-tuning and prompt engineering
- Knowledge of AI cost optimization strategies

Database & Infrastructure:
- Advanced PostgreSQL/MongoDB with multi-tenancy patterns
- Redis caching and session management
- Docker/Kubernetes containerization
- AWS/Azure cloud services and serverless functions

Business Integration:
- Stripe Connect and complex billing implementations
- OAuth 2.0 and JWT authentication systems
- Third-party API integration (Go High Level, etc.)
- Webhook management and real-time data sync

Preferred Qualifications

- Education: Bachelor's in Computer Science, Engineering, or equivalent experience
- Experience: 8-12+ years full-stack development with 3+ years AI integration
- SaaS Background: Previous experience building multi-tenant SaaS applications
- Whitelabel Experience: Background in white-label software development
- Startup Experience: Ability to work independently with minimal oversight
- Learning Agility: Proven track record of rapidly adopting new technologies

What Makes You The Perfect Fit

Technical Polyglot:
- You're comfortable switching between multiple programming languages and frameworks
- You can architect systems from database to UI with equal expertise
- You understand both the technical and business implications of your decisions

AI-Forward Mindset:
- You stay current with the rapidly evolving AI/ML landscape
- You understand how to integrate complex AI services into production applications
- You can optimize for both performance and cost in AI-heavy applications

Independent Operator:
- You can take a project from concept to production with minimal guidance
- You're comfortable making architectural decisions that affect the entire platform
- You can balance rapid development with scalable, maintainable code

Business Acumen:
- You understand SaaS business models and subscription economics
- You can implement complex billing and commission systems
- You think about user experience alongside technical implementation

What We Offer

Compensation:
- Competitive salary
- % on recurring fees (currently have 1200 $97 mth paying members)
- Performance bonuses tied to platform success

Work Environment:
- 100% remote with flexible hours
- Latest software tools provided
- Professional development budget for AI/tech conferences
- Direct impact on product direction and company growth

Growth Opportunity:
- Lead technical team expansion as we scale
- Potential CTO track as company grows

Application Process

To Apply, Please Include:

1. Portfolio/GitHub: Links to similar SaaS projects, AI integrations, or multi-tenant applications
2. Cover Letter: Explain your experience with AI APIs and complex full-stack projects
3. Technical Questions (answer briefly):
   - How would you architect a multi-tenant database for this type of application?
   - What's your experience with AI API integrations and cost optimization?
   - How would you implement real-time chat with multiple AI models?
   - Describe your approach to whitelabel infrastructure

Next Steps:
- Initial technical screening call
- Technical architecture discussion
- Code review of relevant past projects
- Final interview with founding team

title: Meta Ads Funnel Optimization & Technical Performance Marketing Specialist (Meta Ads, GTM, Pixel/CAPI)
description:
**Important: This role requires mandatory availability and responsiveness during our core business hours of 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM Pacific Standard Time (PST); please only apply if you can commit to this schedule.**



PLEASE complete your application form below.

This helps us get to know you better, organize our candidate list, and speeds up the hiring process. 



***ONLY applicants who complete this form will be considered!!***

 ---------- / ---------- /f/3fnzn-13438/50RJUPYIMSF9TIEN4C





[[[   Who we’re looking for   ]]]



We’re looking for a hands-on technical performance marketing specialist to help us fix, optimize, and scale our paid acquisition funnels.



The immediate focus is Meta Ads infrastructure: Pixel, Conversions API, GTM, event tracking, custom conversions/events, and attribution accuracy. Longer term, we want someone who can help build and improve funnels across additional channels such as Google Ads, landing pages, analytics, and conversion tracking systems.



This is not a general social media role. We need someone who is strong technically and can diagnose how tracking, attribution, and funnel structure affect ad performance.



[[[   Who You Are   ]]]



- A "Manager of One": You are self-driven, organized, and solve problems efficiently without needing constant supervision.

- Remote-Ready: You have a proven track record of maintaining high visibility in asynchronous environments like ClickUp and Slack.

- Detail-Oriented: You have an exceptional eye for design and aesthetics, ensuring that every pixel aligns with our brand standards.

- Reliable: You understand "Baton Pass" reliability—when you finish a task, you update the status and notify the next person immediately to prevent project stalls.





[[[   Skills & Qualifications   ]]]



We are looking for someone with strong hands-on experience in:



Meta Ads Manager campaign setup, optimization, and troubleshooting
Meta Pixel setup, testing, and debugging
Meta Conversions API, including server-side tracking and event deduplication
Google Tag Manager, including tags, triggers, variables, and preview/debug mode
Custom events and custom conversions
Diagnosing inaccurate, duplicate, or misfiring conversion events
Mapping and tracking full paid acquisition funnels
GA4 or similar analytics tools
Landing page and funnel conversion optimization
Clear documentation of tracking architecture and event logic


The ideal candidate should be able to trace a conversion event from the ad click all the way through the landing page, form/application, booking system, CRM, and Meta Ads Manager reporting.



Must-Have Experience

You should have strong hands-on experience with:

Meta Ads Manager
Meta Pixel
Meta Conversions API
Google Tag Manager
Custom events and custom conversions
Event tracking and debugging
Browser-side vs server-side tracking
Event deduplication
GA4 or similar analytics tools
Paid funnel tracking and conversion optimization


Bonus skills:

Zapier: Designing automated workflows and integrations.
SEO: Managing technical on-page visibility.
AEO: Optimizing content for AI search.




You should be able to confidently answer questions like:

Why is Meta reporting conversions that did not actually happen?
Which button, page load, or server event is firing this conversion?
Is Meta optimizing toward the right action?
Are events duplicated, misfiring, or firing too early in the funnel?


Not a Fit If

This role is probably not right if you:

Only know basic campaign setup
Mainly focus on creatives, hooks, or audience testing
Cannot work confidently in Google Tag Manager
Have not debugged Pixel/CAPI issues before
Rely only on Ads Manager numbers without validating tracking accuracy






[[[ What You’ll Work On ]]]



You will help us:

Audit our current Meta Ads tracking setup
Diagnose incorrect or misleading conversion events
Fix or rebuild Meta Pixel, CAPI, and GTM tracking
Set up clean custom events and/or custom conversions
Ensure Meta is optimizing toward the correct conversion actions
Improve attribution and reporting accuracy
Track the full funnel from ad click to landing page to lead/application/booking
Identify funnel drop-off points and recommend improvements
Support future funnel buildouts across Meta, Google, and other paid channels


[[[ Availability & Logistics ]]]



- Time Zone: Commitment to work within or have significant overlap with the Pacific Standard Time (PST) zone.

- Platforms: Our team uses ClickUp, Slack, Sharepoint, Lastpass, Canva, and Hubstaff. Strong proficiency in these platforms is required.



[[[ Paid Test Job ]]]



We value your time and expertise. Shortlisted applicants will be invited to complete a Paid Test Job. This trial project will allow us to assess your technical skills, your ability to follow our specific SOPs, and your communication style within our asynchronous workflow (ClickUp/Slack).





We are looking for someone who can start by fixing our Meta tracking and attribution foundation, then potentially continue long-term as our technical funnel and performance marketing specialist.



Thank you for taking your time to complete this form. This helps us get to know you better and speeds up the hiring process. 



We thank all applicants for your interest; however, only those selected for an interview will be contacted.



Hope to welcome you to our team!

title: Revenue Operations / Systems Operator
description:

title: Real Estate Executive Assistant & Property Manager (Full-Time, US CST)
description:
About Us:
We are a Chicago-based real estate investment and property management company. We acquire properties, manage a small portfolio of short-term rentals, and utilize data-driven systems to find new leads. We are looking for a dedicated, long-term, full-time Executive Assistant to become the operational backbone of our company and handle a wide variety of administrative tasks.

IMPORTANT: We are looking for a direct hire. NO AGENCIES. We want someone who is looking for a stable, single-client home.

What You Will Do (The Day-to-Day):
This is a dynamic role. Some days you will be heavily focused on data, and other days you will be doing general administrative research or organizing files. Your responsibilities will include:

General Administration & Ad-Hoc Projects (The Bulk of Your Time): Managing the executive inbox, organizing Google Drive folders, researching new software/tools, creating and updating Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs), and general data entry.

Financial Accuracy: Handling receipts, invoices, and expense tracking. You must be able to cross-reference actual receipts against spreadsheets with 100?curacy. Accuracy is more important to us than speed.

Short-Term Rental Management (1-2 Hours/Week): Managing guest communications via Hospitable, handling Airbnb claims, and coordinating seamlessly with our local cleaning crews (Turno) and handymen in Chicago.

CRM Management & Lead Gen (1-2 Hours/Day): Maintaining our Podio database, running property data (like geocoding or zoning), and ensuring our workflows stay organized. There is also potential for Inside Sales (ISA) work, such as calling leads or coordinating with answering services.

Requirements (Non-Negotiable):

Hours: You must work full-time during US Central Standard Time (CST) business hours. This means working the graveyard shift in the Philippines.

Time Tracking: All hours must be logged in real time using our time tracking software. This is non-negotiable and is verified daily.

Single-Client Commitment: This is a full-time, exclusive role. We are aware that billing multiple clients simultaneously happens in the VA community. We do not permit it and we verify compliance. If this is your practice, please do not apply.

Infrastructure: You must have a primary high-speed internet connection AND a reliable backup internet source (mobile hotspot/pocket WiFi). You must also have backup power (UPS or generator) to work through brownouts/typhoons.

Tech Comfort: You don't need to be a developer, but you must be comfortable learning new platforms quickly (Podio, Google Workspace, Hospitable, Zapier).

Communication: Flawless written English and a comfortable, professional phone voice for calling US-based vendors.

The "Bias for Action": If a guest reports a stain or a document is missing, you don't just report the problem to the owner—you initiate the solution, order the replacement, and present the completed task.

How to Apply:
We receive dozens of applications, and we only hire people who read the details.

Please apply via email/platfor ---------- ssage.

To prove you have read this entire job post, you must change the subject line of your application to: "Chicago RE Admin - [Insert Your Favorite Color]". If your subject line says anything else, your application will be deleted.

In your message, include a brief summary of your administrative experience and describe a time you had to find an answer yourself without asking your manager. What was the situation and how did you find it?

Please include a link to a 1-minute voice recording (using Vocaroo or similar) introducing yourself and explaining your backup power/internet setup.

Note: Finalists will be required to complete a brief skills assessment via TestGorilla to verify data entry and reasoning skills.

Compensation & Performance Bonuses:
-Strong Base Pay: $1,000 USD per month, paid bi-weekly via Wise or PayPal.
-Monthly Operational Bonuses: Up to $200/month in extra pay tied directly to flawless execution. You earn this by maintaining 100% accuracy in tasks including Asana task execution, and keeping our Airbnb guest ratings at 4.9+ stars.
-Acquisition Bonuses ($500 per closed deal): > This is NOT a bonus for doing standard CRM data entry on existing leads. To earn this bonus, you must be the originator of the warm lead. This means you either:
1) Actively prospected, cold-called, or texted a raw lead, successfully qualified their motivation, and handed them off to our team.
2) Handled a live inbound lead from our answering service, conducted the initial intake, and successfully booked the appointment. If your proactive communication brings a qualified seller to the table and we buy the house, you get $500.

We want to pay top of the market for a superstar who makes our lives easier and helps the business grow. If you want a long-term home where your attention to detail is financially rewarded, we want to hear from you.

title: Student Success & Community Manager (Full-Time Remote)
description:
Student Success & Community Manager
Full-Time Remote Position
About Us

Get Rich Detailing is a rapidly growing marketing and business education company that helps automotive detailing businesses generate more leads, more bookings, and more revenue through advertising, marketing systems, AI automation, and business coaching.

We currently support over 105 active students across the United States and continue to grow every month.

Our students rely on us for guidance, support, advertising services, and business growth strategies. Because of this, delivering an exceptional student experience is one of the most important parts of our company.

We are looking for a highly organized, professional, and reliable Student Success & Community Manager to take ownership of student communication inside our Skool (SKOOL) community and help ensure every student receives timely support and attention.

Position Overview

Your primary responsibility will be managing communication inside our Skool community.

On a typical day, you can expect to communicate with approximately 20+ students regarding questions, requests, updates, and support needs.

You will not be responsible for running advertising campaigns, managing ad accounts, or making marketing decisions.

Instead, your role is to:

Communicate with students
Answer common questions
Gather information
Submit student requests
Escalate issues when necessary
Keep conversations organized
Ensure every student feels supported

Think of yourself as the bridge between our students and our internal team.

Primary Responsibilities
Student Communication

You will communicate with students daily inside our Skool community.

Students may reach out regarding:

Advertising questions
Campaign updates
Meta ad account issues
Cost Per Lead (CPL) concerns
Ad creative requests
New ad launch requests
Call requests with management
Tier upgrades
Hiring ad requests
Program questions
Technical issues
General support requests

The most important responsibility in this role is ensuring students receive fast, professional, and helpful responses.

Students should never feel ignored or forgotten.

Response Time Expectations

Students must be checked on and responded to consistently throughout the day.

Minimum expectations include:

Monitoring Skool multiple times daily
Responding to student messages promptly
Following up on conversations when needed
Ensuring students receive updates on outstanding requests
Maintaining a professional and positive experience

Students should generally receive attention 2–3 times per day when active conversations are taking place.

Student Request Management

A major part of this role involves determining when a student request should be submitted.

Student Requests are internal forms used to notify management when a student needs assistance with something that requires backend access or action.

Examples of Student Requests

Submit a Student Request when:

A student wants new ads launched
A student wants ad creative changes
A student wants campaign adjustments
A student wants to lower their CPL
A student reports advertising issues
A student requests technical assistance
A student wants paint correction ads launched
A student wants ceramic coating ads launched
A student requests a call with management
A student needs backend account changes

Every conversation that requires action from management should have a Student Request submitted.

Accuracy and organization are extremely important.

Common Situations You'll Handle
Example #1: Ad Error

Student:
"My ads show an error."

Your responsibility:

Reassure the student
Let them know we will investigate
Gather any necessary information
Submit a Student Request
Example #2: Meta Sca ---------- ssages

Student:
"I received a message saying Facebook is shutting down my account."

Your responsibility:

Explain that these messages are common scams
Reassure the student
Let them know they can ignore the message

No Student Request required.

Example #3: High Cost Per Lead (CPL)

Student:
"My CPL is too high."

Your responsibility:

Acknowledge the concern
Let them know management will review it
Submit a Student Request

You are not responsible for optimizing campaigns.

Tier Verification Responsibilities

Certain services require students to be enrolled in our Tier 2 program.

Examples include:

Paint Correction Advertising
Ceramic Coating Advertising

If a student requests these services:

If Student Is Tier 2
Submit Student Request
If Student Is Not Tier 2
Direct them to contact the appropriate tea ---------- mber about upgrading
Once upgraded, submit Student Request
Hiring Ad Requests

Students occasionally request hiring advertisements.

When this occurs:

Explain that hiring ads require an additional fee
Direct the student to the appropriate tea ---------- mber to process payment
Once approved, follow internal procedures
Training & Support

You will receive complete training covering:

Student communication
Community management
Student Request procedures
Escalation processes
Company policies
Common student questions
Tier structures
Internal systems

You will also have direct access to management whenever you are unsure how to handle a situation.

We prefer questions over assumptions.

Qualifications
Required
Excellent written English
Strong communication skills
Reliable internet connection
Professional attitude
Strong organizational skills
Detail-oriented
Ability to follow systems and processes
Ability to multitask and manage conversations
Preferred (Not Required)
Customer support experience
Virtual assistant experience
Community management experience

Facebook (Meta) Ads familiarity
Marketing agency experience
GoHighLevel experience
CRM software experience
Social media marketing knowledge

You do not need to know how to run advertisements.

A basic understanding of marketing terminology is helpful, but we will provide training on our systems and processes.

Who Will Succeed In This Role?

The ideal candidate is:

Friendly
Professional
Organized
Responsive
Consistent
Proactive
Comfortable communicating with people throughout the day
Able to follow instructions carefully
Willing to learn and improve

If you enjoy helping people, staying organized, and being part of a growing company where your work directly impacts customer satisfaction, we'd love to hear from you.

title: Full-Time AI Content Creator (Image + Video)
description:
Full-Time AI Content Creator (Image + Video) 

About the Role

We are a private content agency that builds and operates AI-generated personas for social media (Instagram, X/Twitter) and subscription platforms. We are hiring a full-time AI Content Creator to produce high-quality AI image and video content with strong character consistency. This is a pure content-creation role — no posting, no community management, and no DM handling. You create the assets; another team publishes them. You will receive a complete SOP and a reference library, so your targets and quality standard are clear from day one.

Please note: this role includes creating mature, adult-oriented content for an AI persona. You must be 18+ and fully comfortable working with adult themes. Full content details are covered during the interview. If that is not a fit for you, please do not apply.

What You Will Do

Generate AI images and videos of our personas that stay perfectly consistent (face, body, and style) across every asset.
Produce content following the provided brand and reference guidelines.

Edit, retouch, upscale, and clean up generations to a publish-ready standard.

Follow our metadata and content-sanitizing process before delivery.

Organize finished work in the correct folder structure and submit a short daily report at the end of each shift.

Required Skills and Tools (Must Have)

Hands-on experience with AI image generation: Nano Banana, GPT Image 2, Seedream 4.5, Flux, etc..

ComfyUI with Stable Diffusion, including LoRA training for character consistency is an asset.

Face swap, inpainting, and upscaling.

AI video generation: Wan and/or Kling.

CapCut Pro (advanced editing) — must have.

Strong eye for realism, anatomy, lighting, and detail; able to spot and fix AI artifacts.

Strong Plus (Nice to Have)

Hailuo / MiniMax with Seedance 2.0.
Experience producing content for AI influencer / subscription-platform personas.
Comfortable working primarily on Wavespeed (our main daily platform — tokens provided).

Equipment Requirements

A reliable computer with an NVIDIA GPU, minimum RTX 3060 12GB or RTX 4060 Ti 16GB or Silicon chip Mac is a big asset.
Stable high-speed internet (a live speed test will be done during the interview).

Schedule and Commitment

Full-time: 40 to 50 hours per week.
100% remote and async, flexible schedule.
Our team operates on U.S. Pacific Time — your hours should overlap reasonably and be consistent.
A short end-of-shift daily report is required.

Compensation

$3 to $5 per hour (USD) to start, depending on experience, with performance-based raises.
First month is a paid trial, paid weekly. After the trial, payment moves to monthly.

Portfolio (Required with Your Application)

Send a portfolio that demonstrates character consistency across a set of the SAME AI persona — same face, same body, same style across multiple images and at least one short video. Work that mixes different faces/models will not be considered, because consistency is the core of this role. Full portfolio requirements are shared once you reply.

How to Apply
Reply here on OnlineJobs.ph with the following:

Start your message with the word BIKINI (this confirms you read the full post).
A link to your resume.
A link to your portfolio.
A short note on your AI tool stack and your GPU setup.

Interview Questions (Be Ready to Answer These)

Tell me about your experience creating AI-generated image and video content.
Which AI tools and platforms do you use daily, and what is each one best for?
How did you acquire these skills — self-taught, courses, or previous work?
Walk me through your workflow for keeping a character 100% consistent across a full set.
Describe your experience with LoRA training, face swap, inpainting, and upscaling.
What is your exact hardware setup (GPU model and VRAM)?
What is your internet speed? (We will run a live speed test.)
Are you comfortable creating mature, adult-oriented content for an AI persona?
What is your weekly availability, and can you keep a consistent Pacific-Time-friendly schedule?
How do you handle feedback and revision requests?
What is your dream travel destination, and why?
Why do you want this role specifically?

We review every application that follows the instructions above. Applications missing the filter word, resume, or portfolio will not be considered.

title: Financial Planning & Analysis Analyst
description:
About the Role We're hiring a hands-on Financial Planning & Analysis Analyst to own the day-to-day financial visibility of our telemedicine business. You'll live in our data, turn it into decisions, and help us understand the unit economics of a fast-moving, performance-marketing-driven company.

Responsibilities

- Own and maintain the company P&L, including daily revenue, COGS, and expense tracking
- Generate daily, weekly, and monthly reports
- Reconcile expenses both inside and outside Bask to ensure complete financial visibility
- Monitor ad performance daily across channels, including CAC, ROAS, and spend efficiency
- Build and maintain LTV models segmented by acquisition channel and cohort
- Forecast revenue, contribution margin, and cash flow on a rolling basis
- Build leadership dashboards covering KPIs, cohort views, and channel performance
- Lead pricing analysis, promo and discount ROI, and vendor and SaaS spend reviews
- Deliver budget vs. actuals reporting with variance commentary
- Run scenario modeling for new products, markets, and pricing changes
- Monitor cash flow and runway, and support month-end close alongside accounting
- Partner with marketing, ops, and clinical teams on ad-hoc deep dives, including churn and retention analysis

What We're Looking For

- 3+ years in FP&A, finance, or analytics, ideally at a DTC, telehealth, or subscription company
- Deep experience with LTV/CAC modeling and ad performance analysis
- Comfortable in the weeds with daily data while keeping sight of the strategic picture
- Excel/Sheets fluency; BI tools (Looker, Tableau, Metabase) a plus

To Apply, Please Answer the Following Three Questions:

- Do you have experience running finance for subscription-based ecommerce or DTC brands? If so, please describe.
- Why do you think you'd be a strong fit for this role, and how would you add value to our company?
- What tools do you use day to day to build out and manage your work?

title: Digital Marketing Specialist
description:
We are looking for a creative, results-driven **Marketing Manager / Marketing Specialist** to help grow our brand, sell tickets, attract new customers, and improve our overall marketing strategy.

The ideal candidate should have proven experience creating marketing campaigns, managing digital platforms, analyzing performance, and developing clear strategies that lead to measurable results.

**Responsibilities**

The selected candidate will be responsible for:

* Creating and executing marketing plans to increase brand awareness and customer engagement.
* Managing social media, email marketing, advertising campaigns, and promotional content.
* Developing strategies to generate leads, increase sales, and improve customer retention.
* Tracking campaign performance and providing regular reports.
* Researching competitors, market trends, and customer behavior.
* Working with the team to improve branding, messaging, and promotional materials.
* Recommending marketing tools, software, and platforms to improve results.

**Candidate Requirements**

Applicants must be prepared to:

* **Present a marketing plan** outlining how they would grow the company’s brand, reach more customers, and improve marketing performance.
* **Share past marketing achievements**, including examples of successful campaigns, growth results, increased engagement, lead generation, sales improvement, or brand awareness.
* **Explain which programs, platforms, and tools they plan to use**, such as social media management tools, email marketing platforms, design software, analytics tools, CRM systems, advertising platforms, or automation software.
* Provide examples of previous work, campaigns, reports, or portfolio items when available.

 **Preferred Experience**

The ideal candidate should have experience with some or all of the following:

* Social media marketing
* Google Ads and paid advertising
* Meta/Facebook and Instagram advertising
* Email marketing
* SEO and content marketing
* Canva, Adobe Creative Suite, or similar design tools
* Google Analytics
* CRM or lead management platforms
* Marketing automation tools
* Campaign reporting and performance analysis

**Qualifications**

* Previous marketing experience required.
* Strong communication and creative thinking skills.
* Ability to create and explain a clear marketing strategy.
* Comfortable using marketing software and digital platforms.
* Results-oriented with a track record of measurable success.
* Ability to work independently and meet deadlines.

title: QA Manager
description:
WE’RE HIRING! JOIN OUR TEAM!

Position: QA Manager
Company: Baton ( ---------- )
Location: 100% Remote (WFH)
Work Hours: Mountain Standard Time
Rate/Salary: $8-10 per hour

About the Role

Baton is seeking a highly analytical and detail-oriented QA Manager to oversee quality assurance, compliance, buyer performance, and traffic quality across our call marketplace.

This role is responsible for monitoring call quality, publisher compliance, buyer performance, refund trends, and operational risks to ensure the marketplace maintains high standards of quality and accountability. The QA Manager will proactively identify issues, investigate root causes, and work cross-functionally with Publisher Management, Client Success, Operations, Sales, and Leadership to improve conversion outcomes, reduce preventable credits, and strengthen partner performance.

This is a highly visible role that combines quality assurance, compliance oversight, reporting, operational analysis, and process improvement.

Key Responsibilities

Credit & Refund Oversight
- Monitor credit and refund trends by buyer, campaign, publisher, sub-ID, and category.
- Identify recurring fail reasons, unusual approval rates, and emerging patterns.
- Investigate whether issues originate from traffic quality or buyer-side operational failures.
- Flag buyers with excessive refund requests or abnormal credit behavior.
- Develop recurring reports highlighting refund drivers and trends.
- Recommend corrective actions including routing adjustments, bid changes, publisher feedback, buyer coaching, and traffic filtering improvements.

Call Quality Assurance
- Review call recordings, transcripts, and call outcomes on a daily and weekly basis.
- Evaluate transfer quality, buyer call handling, and overall caller experience.
- Review AI-assisted call interactions where applicable.
- Identify fraud, coached callers, low-intent leads, wrong-service inquiries, compliance concerns, and other quality issues.
- Maintain a library of common quality issues, examples, and training materials.

Buyer Performance Monitoring
- Track buyer answer rates, connection rates, call handling effectiveness, and responsiveness.
- Identify buyers missing calls, creating poor caller experiences, or generating avoidable credits.
- Analyze operational issues impacting conversion performance.
- Surface trends by buyer, region, and campaign.
- Escalate performance concerns to Sales, Client Success, Operations, and Leadership teams.
- Support initiatives that improve buyer accountability and service levels.

Compliance Management
- Maintain publisher compliance records and documentation.
- Ensure required certifications, disclosures, traffic source information, and supporting materials are current and complete.
- Monitor renewal and recertification requirements.
- Review landing pages, disclaimers, and traffic source declarations for compliance.
- Investigate TCPA-related concerns and other compliance alerts.
- Escalate high-risk publishers or traffic sources when necessary.
- Maintain audit-ready compliance documentation.

Alert Monitoring & Investigation
- Monitor alerts related to fraud, TCPA risk, answer-rate issues, abnormal call behavior, and - refund spikes.
- Conduct root cause investigations and document findings.
- Recommend and track corrective actions.
- Collaborate with internal stakeholders to resolve recurring issues.

Reporting & Trend Analysis
- Develop and maintain QA scorecards and performance dashboards.
- Create recurring reports for leadership on:
- Traffic quality
- Buyer performance
- Refund trends
- Compliance risk
- Operational performance
- Translate data into actionable recommendations.
- Measure the effectiveness of implemented solutions over time.

SOP Ownership & Process Improvement
- Create, document, and maintain standard operating procedures for:
- Call reviews
- Compliance reviews
- Refund investigations
- Escalation management
- Quality assurance processes
- Standardize QA definitions, audit criteria, and review methodologies.
- Improve workflows between QA, Publisher Management, Sales, Client Success, and Operations.
- Assist with training and coaching around recurring quality and compliance issues.

Escalation Management
- Serve as the primary point of contact for quality and compliance escalations.
- Route issues to the appropriate teams and stakeholders.
- Track investigations through resolution.
- Identify systemic issues and implement long-term solutions.

Additional Responsibilities
- Audit call disposition accuracy and consistency.
- Review category mapping and call routing logic.
- Monitor buyer coverage failures and no-answer trends.
- Support dispute resolution through call reviews and documentation.
- Maintain training examples of approved versus non-approved traffic.
- Partner with Data and Engineering teams to improve dashboards, alerts, and reporting.
- Help establish thresholds for buyer warnings, pauses, and escalations.

Qualifications

Required
- 5+ years of experience in Quality Assurance, Compliance, Operations, Call Center Management, - Lead Generation, Performance Marketing, or a related field.
- Strong analytical and investigative skills.
- Experience reviewing call recordings, transcripts, and performance data.
- Ability to identify trends and root causes across large datasets.
- Strong reporting and dashboard experience.
- Excellent written and verbal communication skills.
- Highly organized with exceptional attention to detail.
- Experience creating SOPs, documentation, and process improvements.

Preferred
- Experience in pay-per-call, lead generation, affiliate marketing, or call marketplaces.
- Familiarity with TCPA compliance and call tracking platforms.
- Experience working with publisher networks, buyers, and performance marketing ecosystems.
- Experience with AI-driven call handling or conversational AI platforms.
- Experience using CRM, BI, and reporting tools.

Success Metrics (KPIs)
- Accurate and timely delivery of credit and refund trend reporting.
- Percentage of active publishers reviewed monthly.
- Percentage of high-risk buyers audited monthly.
- Time to investigate and escalate quality concerns.
- Reduction in preventable credits and refunds.
- Reduction in buyer-side answer rate and connectivity issues.
- Reduction in invalid, misrouted, or wrong-category calls.
- Compliance documentation completion and audit readiness.
- Alert investigation and resolution rates.
- QA audit volume, quality, and turnaround time.

What Success Looks Like

The successful QA Manager will create visibility into marketplace quality, identify risks before they become costly problems, improve buyer and publisher accountability, strengthen compliance standards, and help Baton maximize revenue by reducing preventable credits and operational inefficiencies.

title: Digital Marketing Specialist
description:
ABOUT ELTRA ELECTRICAL
????????????????????????????????????????

Eltra Electrical is a growing Australian solar and battery storage installation company based in Melbourne, Victoria. We install home battery systems for residential customers and are expanding our direct sales operation. We're building a lean, high-performing remote team to help us scale.

This is a long-term role with a stable, honest business that values clear communication, accountability and results.

????????????????????????????????????????

THE ROLE
????????????????????????????????????????

We're looking for a full-time Digital Marketing Specialist to own our lead generation from day one. You'll be responsible for generating quality inbound leads for home battery storage installations in Melbourne, Australia.

This is a results-focused role — we care about cost per lead and lead quality, not vanity metrics like impressions and followers.

????????????????????????????????????????

WHAT YOU'LL BE DOING
????????????????????????????????????????

Google Ads (Primary Focus)
- Set up, manage and optimise Google Search campaigns targeting homeowners in Melbourne
- Conduct keyword research specific to solar and battery storage
- Write compelling ad copy that drives high-intent clicks
- Set up and monitor conversion tracking (form fills, calls)
- Monitor daily performance — CTR, CPC, cost per lead, conversion rate
- Make bid and budget adjustments to improve results weekly
- Report results clearly every week

Meta Ads (Facebook & Instagram)
- Set up and manage lead generation campaigns on Facebook and Instagram
- Build and test audiences targeting Melbourne homeowners
- Create or brief ad creative (images, short videos)
- Monitor and optimise for cost per lead

SEO & Google Business Profile
- Manage and optimise our Google Business Profile
- Basic on-page SEO to improve local search rankings
- Monitor performance using Google Search Console and Analytics
- Keyword research for local Melbourne suburbs

GoHighLevel (GHL) CRM
- Connect ad campaigns so leads flow automatically into GHL
- Set up basic automations to notify the sales team of new leads
- Monitor lead pipeline and report on lead volume weekly

Creative Support
- Create simple ad graphics using Canva or similar
- Write ad copy and captions

????????????????????????????????????????

WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR
????????????????????????????????????????

MUST HAVE:
? Minimum 1 year of hands-on Google Ads experience managing live client campaigns
? Ability to show actual Google Ads campaign results (not training certificates)
? Experience with Facebook/Meta Ads for lead generation
? Familiar with GoHighLevel or similar CRM platforms
? Strong written English — you'll be writing ad copy for Australian customers
? Available to work Australian business hours (9am–5pm AEST / Melbourne time)
? Reliable internet connection with backup
? Full-time availability — 40 hours per week

NICE TO HAVE:
? Experience running campaigns for home services, trades or solar businesses
? Google Ads certification
? Experience with Australian market targeting
? Basic video editing for short ad content
? SEO experience with Semrush or Ahrefs

????????????????????????????????????????

WHAT WE OFFER
????????????????????????????????????????

???? $600–$960 USD/month depending on experience (negotiable for the right candidate)
???? Performance bonus opportunities as the business grows
???? Long-term stable role — we're building a team, not looking for short-term help
???? We'll invest in your development — tools, training and support provided
???? Set working hours — no unpredictable freelance project work
???? Work from home full time

????????????????????????????????????????

HOW TO APPLY
????????????????????????????????????????

To be considered for this role please answer ALL of the following questions in your application message. Applications that do not answer these questions will not be reviewed.

1. Describe a Google Ads campaign you have managed for a live client. What industry, what was the monthly budget, and what was your average cost per lead?

2. Have you managed Google Ads campaigns targeting Australian customers or locations before? If yes, describe the campaign.

3. How long have you been using GoHighLevel and what specifically have you used it for?

4. What is your Google Ads account MCC ID or can you share a screenshot of a campaign dashboard showing real results?

5. What hours are you available to work in Melbourne AEST time?

6. Why do you want to work with an Australian solar and battery company specifically?

Applications that answer these questions clearly and honestly — including admitting what they don't have experience in — will be prioritised over applications that claim to be able to do everything.

We value honesty over impressive-sounding claims.

????????????????????????????????????????

TO APPLY: Send your message with answers to all 6 questions above.

We look forward to hearing from you.

Will Stafford
Director — Eltra Electrical Pty Ltd
 ----------

title: GoHighLevel Client Success Specialist - Full Time, Work From Home
description:
We are expanding and need a full-time GoHighLevel Client Success Specialist to help our clients get up and running, get the most from the platform, and resolve their day-to-day questions.

This is a permanent position. We're looking for someone who wants to stay with our company long term, work alongside our existing team (Filipinos and Australians), and continue to learn and upgrade their skills toward mastery.

This is a broad role. You'll be across the majority of GHL's functionality so you can help clients with whichever features matter to them, deliver training, resolve support requests, and carry out small build projects. You won't be the deepest technical specialist on the team (we have automation specialists and web/funnel designers for that), but you'll be the capable, client-facing all-rounder who keeps clients confident and moving forward.


## WHAT YOU'LL BE DOING

* Deliver new client training via Zoom, walking clients through the features relevant to their business
* Assist with onboarding new clients, including supporting our onboarding specialist with the data migration process
* Handle client support requests, most of which you'll resolve by providing clear written how-to instructions, a Loom video, or a pre-recorded video from our user training library
* Escalate the small number of support requests that require GHL technical support, and track them through to resolution for the client
* Build simple funnels in functional terms - placing forms, buttons and other elements on pages and testing that everything works (our web designers handle the visual design, so you won't need design skills)
* Build simple workflows as part of client projects
* Implement small paid projects at the request of clients
* Communicate clearly and professionally with clients throughout, in both written and spoken English

On more complex projects, you'll have backup from our team to help with the more challenging tasks. You're never left alone with a hard problem.


## LEARNING AND GROWTH

You'll have the opportunity to deepen your GHL expertise and to work with AI tools as part of your role. We invest in our team's growth and provide training. If you enjoy learning and want to move toward mastery of the platform, you'll fit in well here.


## REQUIREMENTS

* 1-2 years of hands-on experience using GoHighLevel across a broad range of features (ideal)
* Previous client-facing work experience - for example customer support, customer success, account management, onboarding, or training. This is a requirement.
* Clear, confident written and spoken English, and comfort speaking with clients on Zoom with screen sharing
* A good working knowledge across most GHL functions: subaccounts, CRM and pipelines, forms, calendars, conversations, funnels, workflows and settings
* The ability to build simple funnels (functionally) and simple workflows
* A background in other IT work - such as networking, technical support, or another technical role - will be an advantage


## KEY PERSONAL QUALITIES

1. Client-focused and patient
2. "Can do" attitude
3. Takes initiative and is efficient
4. Strong problem solver who can work things out without hand-holding
5. High attention to detail
6. Reliable and consistent with communication and availability


## THE DETAILS

This is a full-time position, 40 hours per week. We pay the 13th month in December. We also provide time off in lieu if we need you to work outside your regular hours to meet a deadline. We will expect to be your only employment; we are not interested in people working for multiple clients or running side businesses.

We'd prefer that you work 8am - 4pm Philippines time, as this aligns with the business day here in Australia: 11am - 7pm Sydney time.

Salary: US$900 - US$1,100 per month, depending on experience.


## ABOUT US

We are Clientflow, an Australian GoHighLevel agency focussed on providing SaaS software to white collar services businesses, such as mortgage brokers, real estate services businesses, surveyors, education and training companies, and financial services businesses.

We operate at a higher level of technical competence than most other GoHighLevel agencies. We've built a reputation for technical excellence and outstanding customer service that we will expect you to continue. Because of our reputation, clients trust us to build very sophisticated solutions in GoHighLevel for them. Few HighLevel agencies tackle implementation projects as complex as the ones we routinely complete.


## APPLYING FOR THIS ROLE

Please detail how well your experience matches the requirements above when applying. Include any references that you have from previous employers for similar work, especially client-facing work.

After reviewing applications, we'll hold a short initial interview, followed by a technical skills assessment as a second step.

DO NOT use an AI tool to write your application for this role. We want to hear from you in entirely your own words.

Feel free to also ask any questions that you have about the role and the work involved.

NOTE: Do not contact us through other channels about this role. The only way to be considered for this position is to apply through this website (onlinejobs.ph).

title: LearnWorlds LMS & Digital Product Specialist (Text & Template Focused)
description:
We are a growing educational brand developing high-urgency compliance and advocacy resources for parents navigating the special education system. We are seeking a detail-oriented, systems-focused Virtual Assistant to build out our upcoming course structures and digital download systems inside LearnWorlds.
This project is entirely text- and template-based (no video production or heavy editing required). We have the scripts, written modules, and downloadable PDF toolkits ready—we need an expert to format them beautifully, connect our payment gateways, and test our membership tiers.
Core Responsibilities
Course Layout & Formatting: Configure modules inside LearnWorlds using Ebook/In-line text activities. Use strong visual hierarchy (headings, bold text, bullet points) to ensure the layout is highly readable and clean for stressed parents.
Asset Management: Set up "Digital Download" sections beneath text lessons and upload corresponding PDF/Word documents ensuring zero broken links.
Ecommerce & Tier Configuration: Set up a 3-tiered product pricing framework and map user access permissions seamlessly for multi-tier access and membership subscriptions.
Quality Assurance: Run thorough testing on course navigation, link functionality, and checkout sequences to ensure an absolute zero-bug learner experience.
Required Skills & Experience
Proven experience working inside LearnWorlds (experience with alternative platforms like Moodle, Rise 360, or Canvas is highly valued if you can adapt quickly).
Strong understanding of UI/UX layout, text scannability, or WCAG accessibility standards.
Experience setting up payment gateways, course tiers, or bundles.
Knowledge of linking LMS systems to marketing automation tools (e.g., email service providers) is a major plus.
Compensation & Growth
Starting Salary: $5.00 per hour.
Hours: Part-time to start, with a clear path to permanent, consistent hours.
Room to Grow: We are actively expanding an educational ecosystem. Prove your efficiency and technical reliability on this project, and there is immediate room to grow into a long-term technical operations or project coordination role with performance-based pay increases.
How to Apply
To apply, please submit your resume and a brief description of your experience with LearnWorlds or general LMS setup.

title: Website Designer, Local SEO & GoHighLevel Specialist
description:
# Website Designer, Local SEO & GoHighLevel Specialist

We're looking for someone who can build high-quality websites in GoHighLevel and help local businesses improve their Google visibility, generate more leads, and rank higher in Google Maps. SEO

This role starts on a per-project basis, with the potential to transition into a full-time position with consistent ongoing work for the right candidate.

* Research keywords using Google search, competitor analysis, and SEO tools to guide website structure and content
* Create service pages, location pages, and landing pages based on SEO opportunities
* Write or structure website copy that helps improve rankings and generate leads
* Build websites that are optimized for conversions, user experience, and mobile devices
* Connect domains, forms, calendars, tracking, and integrations

### Local SEO & Google Business Profile

* Understanding of search intent and how to structure pages to rank and generate leads

* Meta Ads

## Compensation

## To Apply

Please also send:

* Examples of websites you've built
* Google Business Profiles you've optimized
* Local SEO results you've achieved (if available)

Applications without a Loom video and portfolio examples will not be considered.

**We're looking for someone who can take a project from setup to completion with minimal supervision and deliver work that helps clients generate more leads.**

title: Tax Attorney
description:
The ideal candidate has exposure to U.S. federal tax matters and is comfortable working within structured systems, meeting deadlines, and supporting IRS administrative proceedings under supervision.

MANDATORY QUALIFICATIONS

• Active bar license in at least one U.S. state or U.S. territory
• In good standing with all applicable bar authorities
• Must have or be eligible to obtain an IRS CAF (Centralized Authorization File) number
• Juris Doctor (J.D.) from an accredited law school
• Minimum 2 years of legal experience
• Exposure to U.S. federal tax law (controversy, compliance, or planning)
• Strong legal research and drafting skills
• Excellent written English
• Reliable high-speed internet and professional remote work setup

PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS

• Experience with IRS administrative procedures
• Familiarity with IRS transcripts and collections processes
• Drafting experience including audit responses, protest letters, appeals submissions, penalty abatement requests, and Offer in Compromise documentation
• LLM in Taxation (preferred but not required)

title: Digital Marketing & Content Creator — Faith-Based Clinical Wellness Brand (NOT a Basic VA Role)
description:
READ THIS FULLY BEFORE YOU APPLY. If you skip anything in this post, your application will be deleted without response.

----------------------------------------------------------------
WHO WE ARE
----------------------------------------------------------------

RAW Global Industries is a faith-centered, clinical holistic wellness brand founded by Ceandrys E. Black, CHHP, CAS, Doctoral Candidate in Functional Medicine. We offer the Alivea clinical wellness program and the RAW Body Essentials practitioner-formulated product line. Our brand integrates faith, clinical science, and whole-body healing — body, soul, and spirit. We are not a boutique lifestyle brand. We are a practitioner-led wellness brand built on real results and real transformation.

Visit our website before applying:  ---------- 

----------------------------------------------------------------
WHAT THIS ROLE IS
----------------------------------------------------------------

This is a content execution role. Not a strategy role. Not a management role. You will be creating the content, editing the content, writing the captions, building the emails, and posting — consistently, on schedule, and to a standard that reflects our brand.

TikTok is our top priority. If you are not actively creating short-form video content right now, do not apply.

----------------------------------------------------------------
CORE RESPONSIBILITIES
----------------------------------------------------------------

TikTok Content Creation and Growth
- Create, film concept direction, edit, and post a minimum of 4 to 5 TikToks per week in our brand voice
- Write hooks, scripts, and captions that educate, inspire, and convert
- Stay current on trends and adapt them to our clinical, faith-integrated wellness positioning
- Include clear CTAs in every video driving traffic to  ----------  or our Clarity Call booking page
- Monitor analytics weekly and adjust based on what is converting, not just what is getting views

Instagram and Facebook
- Create and schedule weekly content calendars minimum two weeks in advance
- Design graphics using Canva Pro
- Edit Reels and short-form video using CapCut or equivalent
- Write captions that are brand-accurate, educational, and built to convert
- Repurpose content across platforms strategically


Email Marketing
- Write and send weekly email campaigns with strong CTAs
- Build welcome sequences, nurture flows, and re-engagement automations
- Treat email as a sales channel — open rates, click rates, and bookings are the measure of success

Lead Support and Conversion
- Respond to DMs and comments in our brand voice
- Support warm lead follow-up and booking processes
- Collaborate with our customer support VA to align content with active outreach

----------------------------------------------------------------
YOU ARE THE RIGHT PERSON IF YOU:
----------------------------------------------------------------

- Have created short-form video content yourself — not assigned it to someone else
- Understand how to move someone from a first view to a purchase through content sequencing
- Can write in a brand voice that is clinical, faith-forward, warm, and premium
- Are self-directed and deliver without being chased
- Have worked in wellness, health, or faith-based brands and understand this audience

----------------------------------------------------------------
DO NOT APPLY IF YOU:
----------------------------------------------------------------

- Can only do strategy and need others to execute
- Have never personally created TikTok content
- Need constant instruction to produce weekly deliverables
- Cannot show documented results from previous content you have created

----------------------------------------------------------------
HOW TO APPLY — FOLLOW EVERY STEP OR YOUR APPLICATION WILL NOT BE READ
----------------------------------------------------------------

Before anything else, visit  ----------  and spend time on the site.

Then submit the following:

STEP 1 — THE FILTER
At the very top of your application write the phrase: Whole Body, Whole Brand.
Applications that do not begin with this phrase will be deleted immediately without being read.
This tells us you read everything.

STEP 2 — BRAND RESEARCH TASK (Required)
After visiting  ----------  answer these three questions in writing.
No more than one paragraph each:

- Who is the RAW Global Industries target client and what are they struggling with?
- How would you describe the RAW brand voice and aesthetic to someone who has never heard of us?
- What is one specific thing you would change or improve on our current social media or website presence and why?

STEP 3 — PROOF OF WORK
Submit links or screenshots of a minimum of three pieces of short-form video or social media content you personally created. Not content you managed. Content you made.

STEP 4 — LOOM VIDEO (2 to 3 minutes)
Record a short Loom video answering:
- How would you grow a faith-based clinical wellness brand on TikTok in the first 30 days?
- What would your first two weeks look like specifically for RAW Global Industries?

STEP 5 — RATE AND AVAILABILITY
Include your monthly rate expectation and your weekly availability in hours.

Applications missing any of the above will not receive a response. No exceptions.

title: Experienced DMCA & Copyright Infringement VA
description:
We’re looking for an experienced Virtual Assistant to help us identify, document, and remove copyright infringements across the web.

This role is only for someone who already has hands-on experience with DMCA takedowns, copyright enforcement, platform reporting, and infringement documentation. Please do not apply if you are new to this type of work.

Responsibilities

You will be responsible for:

Finding unauthorized copies of our copyrighted content, products, images, videos, landing pages, ads, PDFs, courses, and digital assets
Monitoring websites, marketplaces, social platforms, ad libraries, search engines, and file-sharing platforms for infringements
Documenting infringements with clear evidence, including URLs, screenshots, dates, account names, and platform details
Preparing and submitting DMCA takedown notices
Filing copyright infringement reports on platforms 
Following up on submitted claims until the infringing content is removed
Tracking all cases in a spreadsheet or project management tool
Escalating repeat offenders or more complex cases when needed
Creating repeatable SOPs for our copyright enforcement process

Requirements

You must have:

Proven experience handling DMCA takedowns and copyright infringement reports
Experience identifying infringing websites, ads, social media posts, stores, videos, product listings, or digital downloads
Knowledge of how to find hosting providers, domain registrars, website owners, platform abuse contacts, and relevant reporting forms
Strong attention to detail when collecting evidence
Ability to write clear, professional takedown notices
Experience keeping organized case logs and follow-up systems
Strong English writing skills
Ability to work independently and move cases forward without hand-holding

Experience with any of the following is a big plus:

Ecommerce brand protection
Course piracy removal
Counterfeit product listings
Ad copy / creative theft
Reverse image search tools
Google deindexing requests
WHOIS / DNS lookup tools
Hosting provider abuse reports
Brand protection tools or workflows
Important

This is not a beginner role.

We are not looking for someone who wants to “learn DMCA.” We need someone who has already done this work before and can show examples of previous copyright enforcement, takedown, or brand protection experience.

title: Back End Developer (Rust / Python / TimescaleDB)
description:
COMPANY DESCRIPTION

We are a fast-growing company building advanced analytics platforms and dashboards for traders, builders, analysts, quants and researchers. indices, compression, partitioning, caching, query tuning

Bonus (Highly Valued)

$60,000 – $70,000 PHP per month

Who Should Apply

• Enjoys winning and hitting targets

• Is disciplined with CRM updates and follow?ups

Please Do NOT Apply If

• You are sloppy with systems or CRM updates

And prove to us in your application that you are in deed an A-Player that wants to make bank.

title: eCommerce Virtual Assistant
