title: SEO & AI Search Specialist
description:
Job Title: SEO & AI Search Specialist (Boutique Finance/Mortgage)
Job Type: Part-Time (8–10 hours per week to start)

About Us
Orca Home Loans is a boutique mortgage broking firm based in Sydney, Australia. We prioritize a "strategy-first" approach to lending, focusing on clear, jargon-free guidance to help our clients make informed, long-term financial decisions. We specialize in providing tailored solutions for first-home buyer loans, refinancing, and investment property purchases.

The Role
We are seeking a highly skilled, part-time SEO Specialist to elevate the technical SEO maturity of our website ( ---------- ). Your objective is to build enduring organic visibility across traditional search engines while simultaneously optimizing our content for the rapidly evolving landscape of Generative AI search engines (often referred to as Generative Engine Optimization or GEO).

You will work collaboratively with our team in an agile, iterative sprint model where we agree on tasks, you execute, and we review together.

Key Responsibilities
Traditional & Technical SEO: Implement robust strategies to ensure our website ranks highly for high-intent mortgage queries in the competitive Sydney market.

AI Searchability (GEO): Structure online content so it is surfaced, cited, and recommended by AI-driven search engines and conversational LLMs.

Structured Data Implementation: Implement and audit comprehensive schema markup (such as FAQs, Organization, and Service schemas) to give AI clear context, as LLMs rely heavily on structured data to accurately interpret content.

Content Formatting for Extraction: Format our educational articles and guides using clear heading hierarchies, bulleted lists, and direct answers, which are highly preferred by AI models for extraction and citation.

Crawler Management: Audit our robots.txt files and server configurations to ensure that both traditional and AI crawlers can successfully access and read our content without being inadvertently blocked.

Recency & Maintenance: Implement a schedule to regularly review and update existing content, leveraging the strong recency bias that AI systems use to select current, trustworthy sources.

About You
Demonstrated, verifiable experience improving searchability, organic traffic, and lead generation for service-based or finance businesses.

Deep understanding of modern SEO best practices and emerging GEO techniques required to capture AI search visibility.

Technical proficiency with Google Search Console, Google Analytics (GA4), schema markup deployment, and website architecture.

Reliable, proactive, honest, and comfortable working within a strictly scoped, part-time hour cap.

How to Apply (Please Read Carefully)
Attention to detail is paramount for this role. To ensure you have read this description in its entirety, please follow these exact application steps:

Use the subject line: "SEO Application: AUTHORITY" (Applications without this exact subject line will be automatically filtered out).

Include a link to your updated resume or onlinejobs.ph profile.

Provide a brief summary or a link to a specific project case study where you successfully improved the organic search visibility of a business.

Confirm your availability for 8–10 hours per week and state your expected hourly rate in USD.

title: Operations & CRM Systems Virtual Assistant (Full-Time Executive Support for COO)
description:
About CoolHed

CoolHed is a fast-growing wellness and thermoregulation company delivering evidence-based solutions across workplace safety, mental health, athletic recovery, education, and corporate wellness. We work with organizations, health professionals, schools, athletes, and industry partners to improve wellbeing, performance, and safety through innovative cooling and recovery technologies.

As we scale across Australia and international markets, we are seeking a highly organized, systems-driven Operations & CRM Systems Specialist to support our COO and build the operational infrastructure that powers our growth.

The Role

This is not a traditional virtual assistant role.

You will own and optimize the systems that drive lead management, partnership development, product rollouts, event follow-up, and executive operations. Your primary objective is to transform contacts, conference leads, and strategic opportunities into structured pipelines that generate measurable business outcomes.

You will work directly with the COO to build scalable operating systems across our key growth pillars:

Construction & Workplace Safety
Mental Health & Corporate Wellness
Education & Kids Programs
Athletic Recovery & Performance
International Expansion (including Japan)
Key Responsibilities
CRM & Pipeline Management (40%)
Own and maintain the company's CRM platform (HubSpot, Pipedrive, Airtable, or equivalent).
Build, organize, and manage contact databases across multiple industry sectors.
Segment leads and create structured sales and partnership pipelines.
Design and execute automated and personalized follow-up workflows.
Track lead progression, engagement, opportunities, and conversion metrics.
Ensure all contacts, conversations, and next actions are accurately recorded.
Operations & Rollout Systems (30%)
Design and improve operating systems for product trials, pilots, and large-scale rollouts.
Coordinate logistics for events, shipments, inventory, and partner activations.
Build dashboards that provide visibility into pipeline health, conversion rates, ROI, and forecasting.
Support implementation projects across workplace safety, education, wellness, and international initiatives.
Events & Outreach (15%)
Manage pre-event preparation and post-event follow-up processes.
Execute structured lead nurturing following conferences and industry events.
Coordinate meetings, scheduling, and follow-up communications.
Maintain detailed records of stakeholder interactions and partnership opportunities.
COO & Executive Operations Support (15%)
Manage calendars, travel coordination, and executive scheduling.
Organize contracts, regulatory documents, patents, and business records.
Track expenses and support reporting requirements.
Conduct market, supplier, and partnership research.
Create SOPs and documentation for repeatable business processes.
Required Skills & Experience
Essential
Proven experience building and managing CRM systems and operational workflows.
Strong hands-on experience with HubSpot, Salesforce, Pipedrive, Airtable, Notion, or similar platforms.
Advanced Google Workspace and/or Microsoft 365 proficiency.
Experience managing professional relationships and nurturing B2B leads.
Strong project management and organizational skills.
Excellent written and verbal communication.
Ability to work independently with minimal supervision.
High attention to detail and commitment to confidentiality.
Highly Desirable
Experience in health, wellness, medical devices, workplace safety, education, or startup environments.
Familiarity with Australian business practices.
Experience with event logistics and international shipping.
Knowledge of automation platforms such as Zapier or Make.
What Success Looks Like in the First 90 Days
All existing and new leads entered, segmented, and actively managed within the CRM.
Automated follow-up systems implemented and operating effectively.
Real-time dashboards providing visibility across all growth pillars.
SOPs documented for key business processes.
COO workload reduced by 15–20+ hours per week through improved systems and delegation.
Tangible pipeline growth resulting in pilots, partnerships, and revenue opportunities.
Ideal Candidate

You are a systems thinker who enjoys creating order from complexity.

You thrive in growth-stage environments, take ownership of outcomes, and proactively identify opportunities to improve processes. You enjoy building scalable systems, managing relationships, and helping leaders operate more effectively.

If you are excited by the opportunity to play a central role in scaling a purpose-driven company, we'd love to hear from you.

How to Apply

Please submit:

Your resume/CV.
A brief summary of your CRM and operations experience.
Examples of systems, automations, or workflows you have built.
A short Loom video (optional but highly encouraged) introducing yourself and explaining why you're a strong fit for this role.

Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.

title: Autodesk Inventor C# Automation Expert
description:
We are looking for an experienced Autodesk Inventor automation expert to help with an existing structural automation system built in C#.

The role includes improving our current Inventor automation, troubleshooting issues, updating code, and making the workflow faster and more reliable.

You must have strong experience with Autodesk Inventor API, C#, parts, assemblies, drawings, parameters, and automation workflows.

Experience with RHS/SHS, fabrication, or construction models is preferred.

Please apply with your resume and a short screen recording showing an Inventor automation tool or workflow you have built before.

title: GoHighLevel (GHL) Platform Specialist — Build & Architecture
description:
GoHighLevel (GHL) Platform Specialist — Build & Architecture
Type: Part-time, Remote VA — 15-25 hours per week Location: Philippines-based (remote). You'll work directly with our U.S.-based in-house team, so reliable overlap with U.S. Central business hours is required. Reports to: VP and Marketing Lead
________________________________________
About Us
We're an established U.S. manufacturer running two distinct brands under one corporate roof — one consumer-facing (D2C) and one commercial/B2B. We're standing up our entire GoHighLevel platform from the ground up across three sub-accounts, and we need a true GHL expert to architect it correctly the first time.
The Role
This is a build-it-from-scratch role. You'll own the architecture and full buildout of our GHL instance — all three sub-accounts — and make every feature in our plan work together cleanly: marketing, sales, CRM, and AI. We're not looking for a patchwork. We want a platform that flows seamlessly, scales as we grow, and is documented well enough to hand off to our team.
You won't be working alone. We have a full marketing team handling strategy, copy, creative, and assets outside of GHL — your job is to take that work and set it all up correctly inside GHL so it runs smoothly. You're the technical builder who makes the platform execute on what the team creates.
What You'll Do
• Architect and build three GHL sub-accounts from a blank slate (agency/location structure, settings, permissions, branding)
• Design and build funnels, websites, and landing pages
• Build automated workflows and campaigns — email, SMS, voicemail drops, triggers, and multi-step sequences
• Configure the full CRM: pipelines, opportunities, custom fields, tags, smart lists, and segmentation
• Set up calendars, booking flows, and lead routing/assignment logic
• Implement and tune GHL's AI features (Conversation AI / Voice AI bots, AI Employee, Content AI) for our specific use cases
• Set up reputation management, missed-call text-back, and review-request automations
• Connect integrations — Zapier, webhooks, payments, and third-party tools in our stack
• Integrate the GHL CRM with QuickBooks Online so customer records and invoicing stay in sync (our customer invoices live in QBO)
• Build reporting dashboards and attribution so we can see what's actually working
• Document the build (SOPs + Loom walkthroughs) so the team can operate and maintain it
What You Bring (Required)
• Minimum 2 years of hands-on GoHighLevel experience — building, not just using
• Proven track record setting up multi-sub-account / agency-level GHL instances
• Deep fluency across funnels, workflows, CRM, calendars, and AI features
• Clear, fluent written and spoken English — you'll communicate directly with our U.S.-based in-house team, so this is non-negotiable
• Strong systems thinking; you build clean, scalable, well-organized structures
• Self-directed and accountable — give you a goal and you run with it
Nice to Have
• Experience with manufacturing, e-commerce, or dual B2B + D2C businesses
• Hands-on experience integrating GHL with QuickBooks Online (or via Zapier/middleware) for customer invoicing
• Familiarity with WooCommerce, Cin7, or marketplace tools
• API / webhook and custom integration experience
Non-Negotiables
• Clear, fluent English — written and verbal — to work directly with our U.S. in-house team
• Philippines-based, with reliable overlap with U.S. Central business hours
• 2+ years of real GHL build experience
• Reliable, communicative, and deadline-driven
How to Apply
Send us:
1. A short Loom video (2–3 minutes) walking us through a GHL build you've done — show us your actual work inside the platform, not just a portfolio screenshot.
2. Your resume and links to 2–3 sub-accounts or builds you're proud of.
3. Start your message with your favorite GHL feature and why — so we know you read this all the way through.
Applications without a Loom video will not be reviewed.

title: Operations Manager for eCommerce Agency
description:
We are a growing eCommerce agency working with multiple international clients, and we are looking for a sharp, highly organized, and high-energy Operations Manager who can also handle project management at a strong level.

This is a very important role inside the business.

You will be the person responsible for helping keep the agency organized, making sure tasks are clearly delegated, deadlines are met, communication is strong, and team output is high quality. This is not a passive role and not a basic admin role. We need someone who can think fast, move fast, lead properly, and keep the team aligned.

This role is best for someone who has real experience in operations, team management, project management, eCommerce, and client communication.

What You’ll Be Responsible For
Operations and Team Management

-Manage the day-to-day operations of the agency
-Oversee remote tea ---------- mbers and make sure everyone is aligned and productive
-Delegate tasks clearly and properly based on priority and skill level
-Follow up with tea ---------- mbers to make sure tasks are moving and deadlines are being met
-Spot bottlenecks, delays, and weak performance early and address them fast
-Help improve accountability, structure, and overall team discipline

Project Management

-Take client requests, meeting notes, Loom videos, and feedback and turn them into clear, actionable tasks
-Assign tasks inside ClickUp or other project management tools with proper context, deadlines, and priorities
-Make sure tasks are not just posted, but actually understood by the team
-Keep projects moving forward without needing constant follow-up from the owner
-Ensure urgent tasks are handled on time and important items do not get delayed

Quality Control and Delivery

-Review work before it goes back to the client
-Make sure deliverables are accurate, polished, and aligned with what the client asked for
-Catch mistakes, weak output, or missing details before submission
-Maintain strong internal quality control across all active client projects

Client Communication

-Help manage client communication in a professional, clear, and confident way
-Send updates, follow-ups, and replies on time
-Make sure clients feel taken care of, updated, and supported
-Understand the client’s priorities and communicate them clearly to the team

Systems and Process Improvement

-Improve internal workflows and agency systems
-Help build better SOPs, structure, and processes
-Suggest ways to make the business more efficient
-Identify areas where automation or better systems can save time and improve delivery

What We’re Looking For

-Proven experience as an Operations Manager, Project Manager, or similar leadership role
-Strong experience in eCommerce, websites, and digital marketing environments
-Excellent written and verbal English communication
-Strong leadership and delegation skills
-Very organized, detail-oriented, and proactive
-Able to work with urgency and manage multiple moving parts
-Strong problem-solving ability
-Comfortable managing remote teams
-Comfortable using tools like ClickUp, Slack, Google Workspace, Loom, and similar platforms
-Able to take ownership and reduce the owner’s workload, not add to it

Big Plus If You Have Experience With

-Shopify
-WordPress
-Klaviyo
-Customer support workflows
-Order processing
-Inventory updates
-Canva or basic design coordination
-CRM and automation tools
-Agency operations
-Managing multiple client accounts at once

Important for This Role

This is a full-time, high-focus role inside a small but growing agency.

Because this position is crucial to daily operations, we are looking for someone who can give this role their full attention and energy. You must not have other jobs or active side commitments that will affect your focus, availability, or performance here.

We need someone fully committed, dependable, responsive, and ready to take real ownership.

Who This Role Is For

This role is for someone who:

-likes structure
-can lead people properly
-knows how to manage pressure
-can keep projects organized
-communicates clearly
-has strong urgency
-takes pride in keeping the business running smoothly

This is not for someone who only wants to post tasks, wait for instructions, or do the bare minimum.

Position Details

-Full-time
-Long-term
-Remote
-High ownership role
-Growth opportunity for the right person

How to Apply

To show that you actually read this job post, include the word juice in your cover letter.

Please send:

-Your resume
-A short cover letter explaining your relevant experience
-Why you are a strong fit for this role
-The tools and platforms you have worked with
-Your previous experience managing teams, projects, or agency operations
-If you have strong operations and project management experience in an eCommerce or digital agency setting, we’d love to hear from you.

title: eCommerce Virtual Assistant
description:
We are expanding our remote team and looking for a reliable, disciplined, and ambitious eCommerce Virtual Assistant who wants long-term growth.

Our local agency is based in the Philippines and manages multiple eCommerce brands for international clients. This role is for someone who takes work seriously, learns fast, and wants to build a real career in digital work, not just a short-term VA job.

This is a busy and fast-paced role. Since we work with multiple clients, there will be days with several tasks, urgent revisions, and deadlines. We need someone who can stay organized, work under pressure, follow instructions properly, and remain reliable even when the workload gets heavy.

If you are organized, proactive, and can work independently, this is a strong opportunity.

About the Role

Start Date
Immediate

Schedule
Graveyard shift Philippine time
Monday to Friday
Weekends off

Please note that occasional overtime may be required when there are urgent client tasks, important deadlines, or time-sensitive updates. This does not happen every day, but we need someone who understands that eCommerce work can sometimes require flexibility.

Responsibilities

You will support daily operations across multiple eCommerce brands. Tasks include:

• Managing and updating Shopify, WooCommerce, and Amazon stores
• Writing, editing, and optimizing product listings
• Conducting product, competitor, and market research
• Handling basic customer service and order processing
• Completing website updates and admin tasks
• Assisting with marketing and content-related tasks
• Creating simple graphics and visuals using Canva
• Helping with basic website layout and design improvements
• Using ChatGPT and AI tools to improve speed and accuracy
• Following systems, checklists, and instructions precisely
• Handling multiple tasks across different client accounts
• Responding quickly to task updates during working hours
• Staying organized even when the workload is busy

As you improve, you will manage client accounts more independently and take on higher-value tasks.

Requirements

• Fast learner with strong problem-solving skills
• Organized, detail-oriented, and accountable
• Able to follow instructions and meet deadlines
• Strong communication and reliability
• Proactive mindset and good work ethic
• Comfortable working in a busy and fast-paced environment
• Able to handle pressure and urgent tasks professionally
• Own laptop or desktop
• Stable, high-speed internet connection
• Fully available during assigned working hours
• No other job, client, or commitment that will affect your focus, schedule, or performance

Preferred but Not Required

• Experience with Shopify
• Basic graphic design skills or Canva experience
• Understanding of layout, spacing, and clean design
• Familiarity with ChatGPT or other AI tools
• Basic video editing skills using CapCut
• Previous VA, eCommerce, customer service, or admin experience

We prioritize attitude, discipline, consistency, and reliability over years of experience. Skills can be trained, but work ethic, honesty, and commitment are required from the start.

Compensation and Growth

• Monthly Range: ?25,000 to ?30,000
• Performance Bonus: ?5,000 to ?8,000 per month
• Clear path for raises, promotions, and leadership roles
• Long-term stability for consistent top performers

Why Join Us

• Stable long-term work with a structured eCommerce agency
• Clear systems, feedback, and guidance
• Learn Shopify, Amazon, WooCommerce, and TikTok Shop operations
• Work with automation and AI tools daily
• Gain real experience handling international eCommerce brands
• Real opportunity to grow into senior or leadership roles

Important

This is not a passive VA role where you only wait for instructions. We need someone who can move fast, think clearly, stay focused, and take responsibility for their work.

We are looking for someone who wants to grow with the company long term. If you are only looking for a side job, temporary work, or something easy, this may not be the right fit.

Application Instructions

Please submit the following:

Resume
Internet speed test result
Laptop or PC specifications, including model, processor, RAM, and storage
Short cover letter explaining who you are, what you’ve done, and why you are a strong fit

NOTE:
This is a long-term position with strong potential for career growth. We are looking for someone fully committed to the role. You must not have other jobs, clients, or commitments that may interfere with your schedule, focus, availability, or performance.

title: Customer Service Representative (Remote)
description:
IMPORTANT: Apply via our website - NOT through OnlineJobs.ph

Go to  ---------- /customer-service-vacancy and submit your application there.

We are a growing digital company based in the Netherlands and we are looking for a reliable and empathetic Customer Service Representative to join our team. You will be the first point of contact for our customers - handling questions, solving problems, and making sure every customer leaves the conversation satisfied.

You are NOT doing cold outreach. All conversations are with existing customers or people who have already shown interest in our products. Your job is to help, reassure, and resolve.

IMPORTANT: You will be communicating in written English with customers from the UK, USA, Australia, and other English-speaking markets. Excellent written English is a must - professional, warm, and clear.

What You'll Do:
- Respond to customer emails, live chat, and support tickets in a timely manner
- Handle refund requests, complaints, and product questions with empathy and professionalism
- Answer pre-sale questions and help guide potential customers to a purchase decision
- Troubleshoot common issues and provide clear step-by-step solutions
- Escalate complex issues to the right tea ---------- mber when needed
- Keep track of conversations and outcomes in our CRM

Requirements:
- Excellent written English - professional, warm, and natural (not robotic)
- Experience in customer service, support, or a client-facing role
- Ability to stay calm and empathetic under pressure, especially with frustrated customers
- Strong problem-solving skills and a proactive attitude
- Reliable internet connection and consistent availability
- Comfortable working independently and managing your own queue

Nice to Have:
- Experience with helpdesk tools like Gorgias, Freshdesk, Zendesk, or similar
- Background in e-commerce or digital product support
- Experience handling refunds, complaints, or escalations
- Previous remote work experience

Compensation:
- $4 - $6 per hour (depending on experience)
- Paid weekly or bi-weekly

Why Work With Us:
- Long-term position with growth opportunities
- Clear processes and templates - we set you up for success
- Supportive team - you are never alone with difficult cases
- Flexible schedule with consistent hours

Please include in your application:
1. Describe a time you handled a difficult or frustrated customer. What did you do and what was the outcome?
2. How would you respond to a customer demanding a refund in an aggressive way?
3. What customer service tools or platforms have you used before?
4. What is your availability per week and which time zones can you cover?

We review applications quickly and will respond within 48 hours.

title: Salesforce Administrator
description:
We are a driven group of people who believe we can have a significant impact on the small business finance industry. LLama Loan was founded on the premise that honest finance partners can help small businesses get through challenging times and resolve their cash flow problems. Our risk infrastructure is iterated constantly, and we are quick enough to make decisions. Our company benefits from market turbulence. We think outside the box.

We are seeking an experienced and detail-oriented Salesforce Administrator to manage, maintain, and enhance our Salesforce platform. The ideal candidate will have strong expertise in Salesforce administration, security, automation, data management, reporting, and user support. This role will work closely with business stakeholders to ensure Salesforce solutions align with organizational needs and business processes.

KEY RESPONSIBILITIES: 
Salesforce Administration
• Configure and maintain Salesforce objects, fields, page layouts, record types, validation rules, and custom settings.
• Manage Salesforce users, roles, profiles, permission sets, and access controls.
• Implement and maintain Salesforce security model, including sharing rules, role hierarchy, and field-level security.
• Support sandbox management, refresh activities, and environment governance.

Automation & Process Optimization
• Design, build, and maintain Salesforce Flows to automate business processes.
• Analyze existing processes and recommend improvements to increase efficiency and scalability.
• Troubleshoot and resolve automation-related issues.

Reporting & Analytics
• Create and maintain custom report types, reports, and dashboards.
• Develop meaningful business insights through Salesforce reporting and analytics.
• Support stakeholders with ad hoc reporting requirements.

Data Management
• Perform data imports, exports, cleansing, deduplication, and mass updates using Salesforce tools and Excel.
• Manage data integrity, quality, and governance processes.
• Utilize Data Loader and other Salesforce data management tools for bulk operations.

Deployment & Testing
• Participate in deployment planning and execution across Salesforce environments.
• Perform system testing, user acceptance testing (UAT), and validation of new features and enhancements.
• Maintain deployment documentation and change management processes.

Integrations & System Support
• Support Salesforce integrations with third-party applications and internal systems.
• Assist in troubleshooting integration issues and coordinate with development teams when necessary.
• Monitor system performance and ensure platform reliability.

User Support & Training
• Provide day-to-day Salesforce support to users.
• Create and maintain documentation, training materials, and best practices.
• Conduct user training sessions and onboarding for new tea ---------- mbers.

Required Skills & Qualifications
• Strong knowledge of Salesforce Security Model (Profiles, Permission Sets, Roles, Sharing Rules, Field-Level Security).
• Experience with Page Layouts, Record Types, Custom Fields, Validation Rules, and Formula Fields.
• Hands-on experience with Salesforce Flow automation.
• Strong reporting and dashboard development skills.
• Experience creating Custom Report Types and advanced reports.
• Knowledge of Salesforce deployment processes and sandbox management.
• Experience with Salesforce data management tools, including Data Loader.
• Strong Excel skills for data analysis, cleansing, and bulk updates.
• Understanding of Salesforce integrations and APIs.
• Experience with testing, troubleshooting, and system maintenance.
• Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills.
• Strong analytical and problem-solving abilities.

Preferred Qualifications
• Salesforce Administrator Certification.
• Experience with Sales Cloud and Service Cloud.
• Knowledge of change sets, DevOps, and release management practices.
• Basic understanding of Apex, SOQL, and Lightning Components.
• Experience working in Agile environments.

Success Factors
• Ability to understand business requirements and translate them into Salesforce solutions.
• Strong attention to detail and commitment to data quality.
• Proactive approach to identifying process improvements and platform enhancements.
• Ability to manage multiple priorities in a fast-paced environment.



For interested applicants, PLEASE SEND AN ACCESSIBLE LINK TO YOUR UPDATED CV/RESUME.

title: VA - Affiliate Marketing Technical Integration Manager
description:
I run a marketing agency that I started last year with a $4,000 loan and scaled to seven figures in annual revenue within 18 months. I'm hiring one person to work alongside me long-term and gradually take over key parts of what I do day-to-day.
This is a hands-on role on a fast-moving team, and you'll learn the exact systems behind that growth. (You can see how we operate on my YouTube channel.)   ---------- 
I'm not looking for a long résumé or 10 years of experience — I'm looking for a caffeine addicted addicted kller that will stop at nothing to make his dreams come true, and eventually move to like a 1st world country.

Compensation & benefits

$1000/month base salary
Performance bonus/commission on top of base for strong work
Direct mentorship and access to the playbook and SOPs that took the business to seven figures in one year
(People pay me 500/hour for consulting)
Real room to grow into a managerial position worth 5k/mo as the business grows

What you'll be doing

Taking over repetitive editing tasks I currently handle myself, following existing video tutorials and SOPs 
Producing static image creatives, including AI-generated statics (e.g., with Nano Banana)
Strong technical integration background needed — connecting tools using APIs and webhooks, connect anythign amrketing related (Pixels, CAPI, GTM, Webhook, Zapier)
Working inside our marketing stack: lead-distribution software (e.g., LeadProsper, Leadshook) and funnel builders


This is intermediate integration work — not advanced heavy custom development. 

Extreme ambition — you want to grow alongside a fast-scaling business
Strong sense of urgency — we move fast, and you're willing to put in extra hours when it matters (time is tracked, and extra work is compensated)
Eager to learn — for example, editing on CapCut can be picked up in a few days, and our internal videos/SOPs cover the rest
Reliable, self-directed, and comfortable owning tasks end-to-end

Skills
Required

Willingness and ability to learn editing and AI tools like Veo and Kling quickly (basic to no prior editing experience needed)
Technical integration skills: APIs, webhooks, CAPI, GTM, Pixels, and connecting marketing tools, Google spreadsheet (SUPER Important)
Comfort using AI tools to handle technical and coding tasks

BIG BONUS: You have experience in affiliate marketing understand this site -  ----------  CPC, CPA, CPL (not TikTok influencer stuff)

Nice to have
Intermediate or advanced video/image editing skills
Kling 3.0, Seedance AI Skills

How to apply (please read)

A Loom video introducing yourself is mandatory. I review a large volume of applicants and will not consider applications 1k plus )without one. In the video, tell me anything you think would be useful to someone in my position, scaling a marketing agency fast.
Watch a few videos on my channel first, so you understand exactly what we do. Thank you kindly and have an amazing day.
